name: crawl4ai
description: Crawl4AI — self-hosted LLM-friendly web crawler/extractor. Takes a URL and returns clean markdown of the main content (headless Chromium). Internal-only: no Traefik, reached over the overlay at http://crawl4ai:11235 by the n8n search MCP. Heavy (Chromium) — relies on the host swap. No API token (internal overlay only), no LLM keys (heuristic 'fit' markdown extraction).

env.name: CRAWL4AI_PROXY
env.prompt: Optional: outbound proxy URL for the crawler (http://user:pass@host:port) — leave blank for direct egress
